title: Should I Lease or Buy Solar Panels?
description: Buying typically creates more long-term value, while leasing can reduce upfront cost.
quickAnswer: Buying or financing usually offers more long-term savings because you own the system, while leasing can be simpler upfront but limits benefits.
bestFor: Loan: lower upfront cost with ownership
notBestFor: Lease if you want tax credits
Lease if home sale transfer is a concern

scenario.title: Financing Example
details: Lease has lower upfront friction but lower upside

faqs.question: Can I claim incentives with a lease?
faqs.answer: Usually the system owner claims incentives. With a lease, that is typically the leasing company.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy homeowner solar resources
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
